sample_policies.title: Agricultural Reform Bill
sample_policies.text: The government proposes to increase agricultural subsidies by 20% and provide low-interest loans to farmers for purchasing modern equipment. This policy aims to boost agricultural productivity and reduce rural poverty. Implementation will occur over 18 months with an estimated budget of $500 million. The program will focus on small and marginal farmers in rural areas.

sample_policies.title: Digital Education Initiative
sample_policies.text: Implementation of a nationwide digital education platform providing free online courses and digital literacy programs. The initiative includes distribution of tablets to underserved communities and teacher training programs. Budget allocation of $300 million over 2 years. Target: 10 million students in rural and urban underserved areas.

sample_policies.title: Green Energy Transition Act
sample_policies.text: A comprehensive policy to transition 50% of energy production to renewable sources by 2030. Includes tax incentives for solar panel installation, wind farm development, and electric vehicle adoption. Estimated investment: $2 billion over 8 years. Creates jobs in renewable energy sector while reducing carbon emissions.

sample_policies.title: Universal Healthcare Access
sample_policies.text: Expansion of healthcare coverage to include 100 million additional citizens. Focus on preventive care and rural health infrastructure. Budget increase of $1.2 billion annually. Implementation in phases over 3 years. Partnerships with private hospitals and telemedicine providers.

sample_policies.title: Small Business Tax Reform
sample_policies.text: Reduction in corporate tax rate for small businesses from 25% to 18%. Simplified tax filing process and digital compliance system. Expected to benefit 2 million small enterprises. Revenue loss estimated at $8 billion annually, offset by increased economic activity.
